name: Encirclement at Hattin
flavor: Realms at War Stratagem — a signature card of Saladin. Surround and harry from every side, as at the Horns of Hattin, 1187, until the enemy's armour fails them.
summary: Place 1 Exposed token on each of up to 3 different enemy Warriors anywhere on the Field (lowering their Armour).

effects.text: Up to 3 different enemy Warriors each gain 1 Exposed token.
